reasoning: The control RA-3(4) focuses on predictive cyber analytics and threat detection, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through the integration of threat detection capabilities into admission controllers, audit logging, and network policies. While Kubernetes does not have a direct equivalent to cloud-native threat detection services, these functions represent how Kubernetes can be configured to support threat detection and response mechanisms.
